docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, ADELAIDE AS EXECUTOR FOR THE WILL OF VINCENT KIRCHER

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, ADELAIDE AS EXECUTOR FOR THE WILL OF VINCENT KIRCHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOBADILLA, STEPHEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 445 O'FARRELL STREET, #301, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
